title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and application settings.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Update your general preferences and information.
general.fiscalYearHelper: This will be used for reports and financial calculations.
general.dateFormatHelper: Choose how dates are displayed across the application.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account details and profile.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize your experience.
preferences.compactModeDesc: Show more content in less space.
preferences.showTipsDesc: Display tips to help you use AFAB better.

otherSettings.title: Other Settings
otherSettings.exportDataDesc: Download a copy of your data

businessProfile.title: Business Profile
businessProfile.subtitle: Manage your business information and contact details.
businessProfile.logoHelper: JPG, PNG or SVG. Max size 2MB.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your account security and protect your business data.
security.overviewSubtitle: Review your account security status and important actions.
security.accountSecureDesc: All security settings are active and up to date.
security.passwordSubtitle: Update your password regularly to keep your account secure.
security.twoFactorSubtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.twoFactorEnabledDesc: You'll be required to enter a code when logging in from a new device.
security.loginAlertsSubtitle: Get notified about important login activity.
security.loginAlertsEnabledDesc: We'll send you an email when someone logs in to your account.
security.sessionsSubtitle: Manage devices that are currently signed in to your account.
security.deleteAccountSubtitle: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
security.tipsSubtitle: Follow these best practices to keep your account secure.
security.tip1Desc: Use at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.
security.tip2Desc: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security.
security.tip3Desc: Use a strong password for your email and enable 2FA.
security.tip4Desc: Regularly check and remove unknown devices.
security.needHelpDesc: If you notice any suspicious activity or need help securing your account, our support team is here for you.
